name: Black Bean Gazpacho
recipeIngredient: Hot style vegetable juice (12-oz. can = 1-1/2 cups)
Black beans (15-oz. can, rinsed and drained) or garbanzo beans
Cucumber (seeded), yellow summer squash, or zucchini (chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chopped tomatoes, hot vegetable juice, ham, black beans, cucumber, squash, chopped pepper, and green onion in a large mixing bowl.
2. Add Italian salad dressing and stir to combine.
3. Cover the mixture and chill for 2 to 24 hours.
4. If desired, serve with bottled hot pepper sauce.
Makes 4 main-dish servings.
Nutrition facts per serving: 201 cal., 6 g total fat (1 g sat. fat), 11 mg chol., 1,247 mg sodium, 25 g carbs, 8 g fiber, 17 g protein. Daily Value: 17% vit. A, 82% vit. C, 8% calcium, 19% iron.
